output: Executed batch 3 task T3 in `src/features/admin_chat/agent.py`. Updated the admin chat system prompt so `share_to_social` explicitly documents direct posting without a Discord message using `tweet_text` and optional `media_urls`, and calls out retweets via `action=retweet` plus `target_post`. I also aligned the detailed tool synopsis with the higher-level media-tools instruction so the prompt no longer gives conflicting guidance about requiring a Discord message reference. Verification passed with `python -m py_compile src/features/admin_chat/agent.py` and direct text checks in the updated prompt. Checkpoint written to `.megaplan/plans/add-a-direct-post-mode-to-20260412-2125/execution_batch_3.json`.
